name: EuiTabs
visualDescription: A horizontal row of tab items, each a text label with generous padding. The active tab is visually distinguished by a solid underline (2–3px, primary color) or a filled background depending on the variant. Inactive tabs are muted. The tab bar sits above the content it controls. NOT EuiSteps (tabs are non-sequential navigation, steps imply a progression). NOT a segmented control / EuiButtonGroup.

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

children.description: ReactNode to render as this component's content

expand.description:
Evenly stretches each tab to fill the
horizontal space

bottomBorder.description: Adds a bottom border to separate it from the content after

size.description: Sizes affect both font size and overall size.
